name: Improve the Way
about: Propose a better agent, workflow, guardrail, or a change to the standard
title: "[proposal] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage

## The problem
<!-- What's missing or weak in the Way today? A concrete scenario beats an abstraction. -->

## Proposal
<!-- What you'd change. If it touches STANDARD.md (a MUST/SHOULD), say so - that's a normative change. -->

## Type
- [ ] New/better review lens or ops agent (`agents/`)
- [ ] Workflow / script hardening (`.github/`, `scripts/`)
- [ ] A change to the normative standard (`STANDARD.md`), needs maintainer + governance review
- [ ] Docs / playbook

## Disclosure
- [ ] Written by a human.
- [ ] Written by an AI agent under human direction.
